welcome_message:
Welcome to FA Quest Lab.

This bot can run different walking quests.
Enter the quest code from your teacher to begin.
invalid_code_message:
I can’t find this quest code.

Check the code from your teacher and try again.
inactive_code_message:
This quest code exists, but it is not active right now.

Ask your teacher whether the quest has already started.
